author: doll-agent
content: Implemented slice(arr, start, stop) in ferray-strings::extras with character-aware indexing (correctly handles multi-byte UTF-8 like 'café'). Negative indices count from the end (Python-style). step parameter is intentionally not supported — character-level reverse iteration is non-trivial under multi-byte UTF-8; chain two slice calls if needed. 4 unit tests cover basic, negative indices, Unicode multi-byte, and stop <= start (empty result).
